title: Fidget Crater Ball (One at Random)
description: Keep the kids entertained with this Fidget Crater Ball. This Crater ball is a squeezy sensory ball with an extreme gravity-defying bounce! Made from a lightweight material and featuring a cratered design that allows you to bounce this crater ball higher than any regular ball. Easily fitting in one hand, they can be put in your bag or pocket to take on the go. Coming in a range of bright colours they're easy to follow in the air. Bounce it on walls, pavements and any other hard surface, play a game with your friends and see who can bounce it higher! Please note this product is selected and sent at random so we cannot guarantee which colour you will receive. One colour supplied at random.
